services.name: Option suivi (add-on)
services.label: Optional tracking add-on
services.description: Optional tracking when posting Lettre verte without using Lettre verte suivie (e.g. Mon Timbre en ligne). Catalog uses a nominal add-on row; verify current fee on laposte.fr.

services.name: Avis de réception (national)
services.label: Return receipt add-on (France)
services.description: Optional avis de réception papier national, priced per official Lettre recommandée table (laposte.fr tarifs 2026). Add to a recommandée base product when the purchase flow offers it.

services.name: Avis de réception (international)
services.label: Return receipt add-on (international)
services.description: Optional avis de réception for international registered letter, per official 2026 tariff table.
